about.title: About Me
about.description: Full-Stack SSr developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable solutions in high-demand environments. Specialist in backend with C# and Python, and frontend with React and Angular. Solid experience in microservices architecture, SOLID principles, and robust API design (REST/gRPC). Worked with Docker, AWS, and async messaging (Kafka, RabbitMQ) for highly available systems. I integrate AI-Assisted Development into the SDLC using tools like Claude and Cursor for code generation, refactoring, debugging, and technical documentation.

bullets: Developed and maintained new features on frontend and backend web platforms, improving user experience in an agile, multidisciplinary team.
Implemented code reviews that contributed to reducing production defects.
Led requirements analysis with product and QA teams, ensuring delivery times and quality.
Created and maintained high-quality technical documentation using AI-Assisted Development tools (Claude).
Executed production deployments with CI/CD pipeline supervision.
Developed scalable solutions in C# .NET Core, JavaScript, and TypeScript supporting 50%+ user growth in the payroll module.
Implemented inter-service communication using gRPC and async messaging with Kafka, improving system resilience.
Led deployments and cloud environment management with Azure DevOps and Docker, achieving 99.9% uptime.
Implemented microfrontends with Angular.js and React.js, improving modularity and feature delivery speed.
Actively participated in code reviews and technical mentoring.
Developed APIs with Python and GraphQL, reducing query complexity by 20% vs. the previous system.
Integrated chatbots with Dialogflow and React, automating 60% of frequent user queries.
Fixed legacy system bugs, improving operational efficiency and platform stability.
Configured local environments with Docker and YAML files to standardize the development flow.
Implemented RabbitMQ messaging for async event processing.
Developed Odoo modules (Python) and JavaScript components, extending ERP capabilities for 3 business units.
Updated microservices with Python, LXD, and Ansible, reducing deployment times.
Implemented secure APIs using GraphQL, Aiohttp, AsyncIO, and JWT.
Configured real-time monitoring with NetData and Grafana, improving incident visibility.
Led inventory data migration for 20 commercial warehouses with zero data loss.
Trained 10 process leaders on ERP usage and parameterization, reducing post-implementation errors by 25%.
Prepared, validated, and processed master data for successful migration to the new ERP.

icesi.degree: Data Science, Digital Technologies and Analytics
